dc_description: A weathered yellow-and-gray metal rowboat rests on concrete blocks in a grassy orchard or garden area. The scene is filled with mature olive-like trees with silvery foliage, wild grass, and small white and blue flowers. A dark hedge runs along the background, with a blue gate visible on the right side. The lighting appears soft and subdued, suggesting late afternoon or shaded conditions.
novel_visual_observations: The boat has visible lettering and a small Italian flag decal on its yellow side.
The ground vegetation is uneven, with patches of bare soil, tall grass, and scattered wildflowers.
location_name: Piazza del Colosseo, Municipio Roma I, Roma
rich_context: Piazza del Colosseo, Celio, Municipio Roma I, Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, 00184, Italia
